# Backend capabilities and data model mapping (2026-03-05 01:57Z)

_**User**_

Focus on API endpoints/trpc procedures, DB schema/tables, realtime mechanisms (polling/socket), file upload/storage, geolocation persistence, AI/LLM/ALPR/agent-like logic, and tests. # Backend Capabilities & Data Model Map

## API Endpoints / tRPC Procedures

| Router | Procedure | Type | Purpose |
|-------|-----------|------|---------|
| **auth** | `me` | query | Current user from session |
| **auth** | `logout` | mutation | Clear session cookie |
| **system** | `health` | query | Health check |
| **system** | `notifyOwner` | mutation | Admin push notification |
| **sightings** | `list` | query | List sightings (limit, offset, minCredibility, hideHidden) |
| **sightings** | `getById` | query | Single sighting by ID |
| **sightings** | `create` | mutation | Create sighting (photo upload + DB insert) |
| **sightings** | `search` | query | Search by license plate |
| **sightings** | `nearby` | query | Haversine-based nearby sightings |
| **vehicleAI** | `analyzePhoto` | mutation | LLM vehicle/agency analysis from image URL |
| **alpr** | `extractPlate` | mutation | LLM-based license plate extraction |
| **plates** | `getByPlate` | query | Sightings for a plate |
| **plates** | `listAll` | query | Tracked plates with counts |
| **convoy** | `detect` | query | Cluster sightings by proximity/time |
| **trending** | `plates` | query | Most reported plates in last 24h |
| **votes** | `getUserVote` | query | Vote for device+sighting |
| **votes** | `cast` | mutation | Upvote/downvote/flag |
| **votes** | `remove` | mutation | Remove vote |
| **votes** | `getCounts` | query | Vote counts for sighting |
| **share** | `getSightingLink` | query | Share link for sighting |
| **share** | `getPlateLinkData` | query | Share link for plate |
| **delta** | `since` | query | Sightings newer than timestamp |
| **proximity** | `nearby` | query | Nearby sightings with optional `since` |
| **export** | `plateHistory` | query | CSV/JSON export for plate |
| **export** | `allSightings` | query | CSV/JSON export of all sightings |
| **anomaly** | `detect` | query | Teleporting, duplicate burst, coordinated report detection |
| **recentPlates** | `list` | query | Recently tracked plates |

**HTTP:** `GET /api/health`, `POST /api/trpc/*` (tRPC batch)

---

## DB Schema / Tables

| Table | Purpose |
|-------|---------|
| **users** | OAuth users (openId, name, email, role, lastSignedIn) |
| **sightings** | Vehicle sightings: licensePlate, photoUrl, lat/lng (decimal), locationAddress, deviceId, AI fields (agencyType, vehicleMake/Model/Color, badgeNumber, uniformDescription, aiConfidence), upvotes/downvotes/flagCount, credibilityScore, isHidden |
| **votes** | Anonymous votes (deviceId, sightingId, voteType: upvote/downvote/flag), unique on (deviceId, sightingId) |

**Indexes:** `licensePlate`, `(latitude, longitude)`, `credibilityScore`, `createdAt`, `(deviceId, sightingId)`, `sightingId`

**Stack:** Drizzle ORM + MySQL2, migrations in `drizzle/0000_*.sql`–`0002_*.sql`

---

## Realtime Mechanisms

- **Polling:** `app/(tabs)/index.tsx` — `setInterval(refetch, 10000)` every 10s for sightings
- **Delta sync:** `delta.since` + `lib/sightings-cache.ts` — AsyncStorage cache + delta fetch
- **WebSocket:** Not implemented; comment in `server/routers.ts` mentions socket.io for future use

---

## File Upload / Storage

- **Flow:** `sightings.create` receives base64 photo → `storagePut()` → Forge storage proxy
- **Config:** `BUILT_IN_FORGE_API_URL`, `BUILT_IN_FORGE_API_KEY` → `v1/storage/upload`, `v1/storage/downloadUrl`
- **Paths:** `sightings/{deviceId}-{timestamp}.jpg`
- **Module:** `server/storage.ts` — `storagePut()`, `storageGet()`

---

## Geolocation Persistence

- **Storage:** `sightings.latitude`, `sightings.longitude` (decimal 10,7), `locationAccuracy`, `locationAddress`
- **Source:** Browser `navigator.geolocation.getCurrentPosition` (camera capture, map, sightings list)
- **Reverse geocode:** Nominatim (OpenStreetMap) in `app/submit.tsx` for `locationAddress`
- **Queries:** `getSightingsNearLocation()` (Haversine), `proximity.nearby`, `convoy.detect`, `anomaly.detect`

---

## AI / LLM / ALPR / Agent Logic

| Component | Purpose |
|-----------|---------|
| **server/_core/llm.ts** | `invokeLLM()` — Gemini 2.5 Flash via Forge API, vision (image_url), tools, JSON schema |
| **vehicleAI.analyzePhoto** | Vehicle/agency analysis from image (plate, make/model/color, agencyType, badge, uniform, confidence) |
| **alpr.extractPlate** | License plate extraction from image URL |
| **voiceTranscription.ts** | Whisper-style transcription (not wired into routers) |
| **imageGeneration.ts** | Image generation via Forge (not wired into routers) |
| **dataApi.ts** | Generic Data API proxy (not wired into routers) |

---

## Tests

| File | Scope |
|------|-------|
| `tests/api.test.ts` | DB: createSighting, getSightingById, getAllSightings, searchSightingsByLicensePlate, castVote, getUserVote, getVoteCounts, credibility/hide logic, getSightingsNearLocation |
| `tests/alpr.test.ts` | Plate normalization and grouping (no server calls) |
| `tests/auth.logout.test.ts` | Auth logout (skipped) |

**Runner:** Vitest (`pnpm test`)

---

## Key Files (One-Line Purpose)

| File | Purpose |
|-----|---------|
| `server/_core/index.ts` | Express server, CORS, OAuth, tRPC at `/api/trpc`, health at `/api/health` |
| `server/routers.ts` | App tRPC router (auth, sightings, vehicleAI, alpr, plates, convoy, votes, share, delta, proximity, export, anomaly) |
| `server/db.ts` | Drizzle DB access, sightings CRUD, votes, Haversine nearby, credibility |
| `server/storage.ts` | Forge storage proxy (upload/download) |
| `server/_core/llm.ts` | LLM client (Gemini 2.5 Flash, vision, tools) |
| `server/_core/trpc.ts` | tRPC setup, public/admin procedures |
| `server/_core/context.ts` | tRPC context (user from JWT/cookie) |
| `server/_core/env.ts` | Env vars (DATABASE_URL, forgeApiUrl/Key, oauth, etc.) |
| `server/_core/oauth.ts` | OAuth routes |
| `server/_core/notification.ts` | Owner notification |
| `drizzle/schema.ts` | users, sightings, votes schema |
| `drizzle.config.ts` | Drizzle Kit MySQL config |
| `lib/trpc.ts` | tRPC React client, httpBatchLink, superjson |
| `lib/sightings-cache.ts` | AsyncStorage cache + delta fetch |
| `hooks/use-proximity-alerts.ts` | Proximity alerts via browser push |

---

## Convex Migration Implications

| Area | Current | Convex Notes |
|------|---------|--------------|
| **Queries** | tRPC queries → Drizzle/MySQL | Map to Convex queries; add indexes for `licensePlate`, `(latitude, longitude)`, `createdAt` |
| **Mutations** | tRPC mutations → DB | Map to Convex mutations; `sightings.create` also uploads photo |
| **Actions** | None | Use Convex actions for external calls: LLM, storage upload, Nominatim |
| **Cron/Scheduler** | None | Optional: anomaly detection, credibility refresh |
| **Files** | Forge storage proxy | Replace with Convex file storage |
| **Vector/RAG** | None | No vector search or RAG currently |
| **Realtime** | Polling | Convex queries are reactive; can remove polling |
| **Auth** | Cookie/JWT + OAuth | Convex Auth or custom identity |
| **Schema** | MySQL (decimal, enum) | Convex schema: `documents` for sightings/votes; `users` for auth |
| **Storage** | `storagePut` to Forge | Convex `storage.store()` or `storage.generateUploadUrl()` |
| **LLM** | `invokeLLM` in mutations | Move to Convex actions (external HTTP) |
| **Geolocation** | Haversine in SQL | Convex has no native geo; use `$near` in search or keep in-memory filtering |

**Important:** MySQL `decimal` and `enum` types need equivalent Convex types. Haversine distance queries need either Convex vector search or an action that queries a geo DB.

---
